pr.title: Enrich pkg.go.dev API docs for exported js/wasm symbols
pr.body:
Exported symbols in the js/wasm surface had little or no Go doc, so pkg.go.dev rendered an incomplete API reference. This updates symbol-level documentation to make the public WebTransport API discoverable and self-describing on pkg.go.dev.

- **API entrypoint docs**
  - Added doc comment for `Dial` in `dial_js.go` describing connection readiness semantics.

- **Session API docs**
  - Added doc comments for `Session` and exported methods in `session_js.go`:
    - `Accept`
    - `Open`
    - `Close`
    - `Context`

- **Connection API docs**
  - Added doc comments for `Conn` and all exported methods in `conn_js.go`:
    - `Read`, `Write`, `Close`
    - `LocalAddr`, `RemoteAddr`
    - `SetDeadline`, `SetReadDeadline`, `SetWriteDeadline`
    - `CloseRead`, `CloseWrite`

```go
// Session represents a WebTransport connection that can open and accept
// bidirectional streams.
type Session struct { /* ... */ }

// Open creates and returns a new outgoing bidirectional stream.
func (s *Session) Open(ctx context.Context) (net.Conn, error) { /* ... */ }
```
pr.author: Copilot
